svg.title: Deep SWE Debug and Rewrite Repo benchmark
svg.desc: Two high-difficulty benchmark groups comparing agent-model harness success and aggregate tokens.

g.text: High-difficulty feature work in unfamiliar production repositories, constrained by full regression suites.
High-difficulty repository reconstruction from observed behavior, preserving compatibility end to end.
ALL BENCHMARKS · 25 TASKS · 6 AGENT + MODEL CONFIGS · 270 SESSIONS
METHOD · SUCCESS = Σ PASSED / Σ CHECKS · TOKENS = Σ TOTALTOKENS · SOURCE = BENCHMARK INDEX JSON
